global_description: A small, compact bird with a rounded body and short tail. It has a predominantly brown and gray plumage with a speckled pattern. The bird features a slender, slightly curved bill and long legs. Its underparts are lighter with a buffy tone.

part_details.plumage: Brown and gray with speckled pattern, providing camouflage against rocky environments.
part_details.bill: Slender, slightly curved, suitable for probing.
part_details.tail: Short, aiding in balance and maneuverability.
part_details.legs: Long, adapted for hopping on rocky surfaces.
part_details.underparts: Lighter with a buffy tone, contrasting with the darker upperparts.

spatial_relations: The slender bill extends from the front of the head.
The short tail is positioned at the rear of the body.
The long legs are positioned beneath the body, supporting it.
